{{Quote|If there's one thing I can warn you about, it's Colicoid Infiltrator-Series droids. They're sneaky. Half the time, you don't hear them coming, and the other half, you wish you hadn't.|[[Mavven]]|<ref name="SGDp78" />}}
The '''Colicoid Infiltrator-series droid''' was an [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] model produced by the [[Colicoid Creation Nest/Legends|Colicoid Creation Nest]]. The droid was used by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].

==Characteristics==
The Infiltrator had 4 multijointed legs and long, sharp curved hooks at the ends of its arms. It was also equipped with storage on its body to store other items it might need during a mission, such as weapons or computer devices.<ref name="SGDp78" />

The deadly Infiltrator used a heurostatic processor. A side-effect of this processor, however, was an increase in chances of the droid rebelling against orders or even going rogue completely.

==History==
[[File:ColicoidInfiltratorAssassinDroid.jpg|left|thumb|Colicoid Infiltrator]]
One of the Infiltrator's primary tactics was to land on the hull of a [[Starship/Legends|starship]], then drill its way in and use an [[atmosphere generator]] to patch the hole behind it before its intended victims could be alerted to its presence. Using a [[holograph]]ically projected disguise field, the droid could then sneak around a ship and quietly assassinate every crew member or passenger, one by one.
